data.body: PASS-2 verification note (no transition): grounded findings 0-8 against the plan body and criteria_v8.json / registry.py / our-criteria-list.md / dso-criteria-specs.md. Confirmed: criteria_v8.json T10 exec=AGENT (~1126), T11 exec=AGENT (~1182), T12 exec=1-TURN (~1230) — citations in findings 7/8 accurate. Note a code/plan discrepancy independent of these findings: registry.py:279 lists T12 in _DET_OVERLAY_RULES (deterministic), while the plan body lists T12 as LLM-routed.
